title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is ON
scenario: Verify that the Share Data toggle remains ON after app restart when enabled during onboarding.
steps: Start the app fresh (clear app data or reinstall).
Tap 'Share Data' (on iOS, select the location option).
Navigate to App Settings > General > Account.
Confirm the Share Data toggle is ON and the description text is displayed.
Navigate again to App Settings > General > Account.
Verify the Share Data toggle remains ON.
expected: The Share Data toggle remains ON after app restart when it was previously enabled.
